dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Ladies and gentlemen, please return to your seats and fasten your seatbelts."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Come on, kitty, lighten up. We're just having a little fun."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, her firm voice commanding respect.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, we're not hurting anyone. Let the man have his fun."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his goofy grin plastered on his face.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Katrina, can you please ensure these passengers return to their seats immediately?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of LEO, his eyes sparkling with mischief.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Yes, of course, Captain. I'll take care of it."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his voice firm but controlled.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Aww, come on, Captain. Don't be such a party pooper."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of KATRINA, her eyes scanning the cabin for any signs of trouble.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Ladies and gentlemen, we're experiencing some turbulence. Please fasten your seatbelts and remain seated."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Whoa, this is crazy! Leo, hold on to your seat!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Point-of-view shot through the cockpit window, the plane tilting violently.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "I've got it, Sam. Just ride it out."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes wide with fear.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Everyone, please stay calm. This is normal turbulence."
dialogue.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of LEO, his face set in a determined expression.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Captain, what's going on? Is everything okay?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're experiencing a bit of a problem, Katrina. I'm trying to stabilize the plane."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her eyes scanning the instrument panels.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Can I help, Captain? Maybe I can assist you?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Point-of-view shot through the cockpit window, the plane shaking violently.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "No, Katrina. I've got this under control. Just get back to the cabin and make sure those passengers are secure."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of KATRINA, her eyes shining with concern.
